pages.title: Netherite Treatment
pages.text: The Blackstone Foundry can melt netherite directly into its internal fluid store. Applying that metal to a tool part will become available through the foundry's casting and draining equipment.$(p)The treated part will keep its original material and gain $(bold)Nether-Forged$().

pages.title: Nether-Forged
pages.text: $(bold)Level I$()$(li)Tool is fireproof$(li)×2 durability$(li)×1.30 physical damage$(li)Eligible heads gain diamond harvest tier$(p)Repeated Nether-Forged components use normal diminishing trait scaling; the finished-tool tooltip shows their exact values.$(p)Nether-Treated and Echoing remain outside the standard roster until they have complete visible treatment processes.
